versions.version_description: The chord arrangement in the Bm key is a nice way to play this as opposed to starting in Em as you can work the base notes of the chords giving you a fuller sound when playing solo accoustic. Also I play the second line of the chorus a little different with an A7 to E or E7 but it makes for a cool sounding cover with a bit more melody in the singing.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is my own version of the chords which are played in a country & western style by
alternate picking of the bass strings. This makes the song sound like how Johnny Cash
might have done it. "Ghost Riders in the Sky" works well as a solo.


[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]B7[/ch]
The Wild Boys are calling on their way back from the fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]B7[/ch]
In August moon surrender to a dust cloud on the rise[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Wild Boys fallen far from glory[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]B7[/ch]
Restless and so hungered on the razor's edge you trail[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B7[/ch]
Because there's murder by the roadside in a sore, afraid new world[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
They tried to tame us looks like they'll try again[/tab]


Chorus;
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
Wild Boys never lose it[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
Wild Boys never chose this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
Wild Boys never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Wild Boys always shine[/tab]


[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]B7[/ch]
You've got sirens for a welcome. There's blood stains for your pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                                    [ch]B7[/ch]
And your telephones been ringing while you're dancing in the rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Wild Boys wonder where is glory[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]B7[/ch]
Where is all you angels now the figure heads have fell[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B7[/ch]
And lovers war with arrows over secrets they could tell[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
They tried to break us, looks like they'll try again[/tab]


Repeat Chorus
